name_es: Ente Caribe — Festival de Musica Electronica
title: Ente Caribe — Festival de Musica Electronica
description: Festival de musica electronica de fin de ano en Cartagena. DJs internacionales y locales en locaciones emblematicas: playas, azoteas y venues del Centro Historico. House, techno, afro house y mas.
description_en: End-of-year electronic music festival in Cartagena. International and local DJs at iconic locations: beaches, rooftops, and Historic Center venues. House, techno, afro house and more.
